emails.subject: Need help finding documentation
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

I'm trying to locate some documentation files in the workspace directory. Could you help me find the text documents there? I specifically need to review any .txt files, but please skip over any backup files or temporary files - those aren't relevant.

Once you find one of the documents, could you send me a quick summary on Slack? I'm in meetings all afternoon but I'll be checking messages.

Thanks!
Bob
